code:
import io
import string

fn second_token(_ line: String) -> Option<String>
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut state = 0
  mut start = 0
  mut stop = 0
  mut found = false
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
      if state == 0
        if not is_ws
          state = 1
        end
      else if state == 1
        if is_ws
          state = 2
        end
      else if state == 2
        if not is_ws
          state = 3
          start = i
        end
      else if state == 3
        if is_ws
          stop = i
          found = true
          i = n
        end
      end
    when None
      i = n
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if found
    Some(string.substring(line, start, stop))
  else if state == 3
    Some(string.substring(line, start, n))
  else
    None
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  mut total = 0
  mut done = false
  while not done
    match io.read_line()
    when Some(line)
      let trimmed = string.trim(line)
      if not string.is_empty(trimmed)
        match second_token(line)
        when Some(tok)
          match string.parse_int(tok)
          when Some(n)
            total = total + n
          when None
            ()
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
      end
    when None
      done = true
    end
  end
  println("sum=#{total}")
end
